us":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3+59MwPbnpAn7yHYclkEJs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2292fc723ba040709bf758155b61fba6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533629&x-signature=tEMy8y%2BwNlA8MevQBr1IqsFPES8%3D","user_id":"5764534803","user_name":"她说是晒黑的/）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"5764534803","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7083409078340291615","book_info":{"abstract":"饿死鬼脱困，三起S级灵异事件同时爆发，驭鬼者总部沦陷！
逃命途中，遭遇灵异袭击的夏风竟诡异的来到了另一个平行世界。
可这个世界依旧有鬼！
鬼无法被杀死。
能对抗鬼的只有鬼。
鬼的出现，将唯物论彻底推翻。
无数灵异事件的发生,让全球各地开始沦陷。
人类陷入了恐惧和绝望。
在这里，没有地府，没有仙神。
只有一群，以身饲鬼的驭鬼者。
为了生存在厉鬼复苏的世界里，挣扎求生。
(无系统+全球异变+求生)","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d07bb78c369a1981e895e0bcc6048ffd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"键盘鬼","author_id":"","book_id":"7083409078340291615","book_name":"全球灵异，我给厉鬼烧纸保平安","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8013人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7083441334047998475","read_count":"8013","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1561760"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"768","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,灵异,求生,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/abc2d84af51c98c65adbb07e031c2b9a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183879&x-signature=aMf9XntH89qZMgxm5QK23t%2FvBa4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"58565845380","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.2246115e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017443979C62FFED9004A8497A0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":50,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12245,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":84434},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1651653936,"author_reply_time":1651653954,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7217416595096798012","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错     内容不错   是一本不错灵异小说   有点小bug不过无伤大雅    等级差有点太模糊不清   我看了半天  我感觉每个鬼都差不多  没有强和弱导致看的有点懵逼   你这个强和弱  大致概念都没有强在哪里 和弱在哪里 大致都没  比如我比你强几倍知道怎么杀人  但是你写的还是旗鼓相当   看的时强时弱  看的人懵逼  比如主角3个鬼拼图  应该碾压1个拼图的没有触发规则的鬼。但是  你写的有时强度都一样。看不出来强在哪里。感觉两个低级随时能打过一样 境界强度模糊太严重了。其他没啥问题  还是个好书
